• I’ve confirmed the handoff is a full replacement of the old plan conflict path, not a feature flag. I’m mapping the exact persistence, sync, schema, CLI, and test surfaces now, then I’ll
  patch them in one pass and validate with targeted tests before the full suite.

• Updated Plan
  └ Implement the single-master plans refactor described in the handoff, then verify it with targeted and full tests.
    ✔ Inspect current plan sync, persistence, schema, CLI lint, and affected tests
    □ Refactor plan sync and persistence to remove bidirectional conflict state for plans
    □ Update schema and migrations for the new plans table shape
    □ Adjust read-model and CLI plan lint behavior
    □ Update and add tests for single-master plan sync behavior
    □ Run targeted tests, full suite, and final grep/schema verification

• I’m at the edit point now. The main thing I’m guarding is not leaving any shadow of the old plan conflict path behind in persistence or tests, because that would keep the broken model
  alive under different names.
